song.title: I Am Crucified with Christ
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) I am crucified with Christ, And the cross has set me free; I have ris’n again with Christ, And He lives and reigns in me.
[C] Chorus Oh! It is so sweet to die with Christ, To the world, and self, and sin; Oh! It is so sweet to live with Christ, As He lives and reigns within.
[V2] 2) Myst’ry hid from ancient ages! But at length to faith made plain: Christ in me the Hope of Glory, Tell it o’er and o’er again.
[V3] 3) This the secret nature hideth, Harvest grows from buried grain; A poor tree with better grafted, Richer, sweeter life doth gain.
[V4] 4) This the secret of the holy, Not our holiness, but Him; O Lord! Empty us and fill us, With Thy fulness to the brim.
song.author: Albert B. Simpson
